positive: A symmetrical, highly stylized central graphic featuring a bioluminescent cosmic fox amidst nebulae and crystalline flora. The fox should have a sleek, elegant silhouette, rendered in contrasting shades of teal, deep indigo, and electric cyan. Surrounding elements include abstract, geometric stellar patterns and intricate, glowing vines. The overall composition must be clean, high-contrast, and suitable for a central t-shirt graphic. Minimalist gothic sci-fi aesthetic, vector art style, dramatic radial symmetry, deep space nebula background, cinematic backlighting, high saturation, graphic novel style, centered composition.
